name: Papaya Global Workforce Payments API
what_it_does: Papaya Global REST API for global workforce payments and employer of record (EOR) platform. Enables AI agents to manage global employee payroll processing across 160+ countries, handle employer of record (EOR) onboarding and lifecycle management, access contractor and freelancer payment workflows, retrieve payroll calculation and tax compliance data by country, manage worker classification and compliance verification, handle benefits administration and equity management, access workforce analytics and cost reporting, retrieve payroll data integration with HRIS platforms, manage payment disbursement and payslip generation, and integrate global payroll data with SAP, Workday, and BambooHR systems.
use_cases: Processing global employee payroll from workforce payment automation agents
Managing EOR worker onboarding from global expansion agents
Handling contractor payments and classification from global workforce agents
Integrating payroll data with HRIS from HR operations agents
not_for: Domestic-only payroll without global workforce and multi-country requirements
Simple contractor payments without EOR compliance and benefits management
SMB payroll without enterprise-scale global workforce management
best_when: A global enterprise or scale-up using Papaya Global wants AI agents to automate cross-border payroll, EOR worker management, contractor classification, country-specific compliance, and HRIS integration.
avoid_when: LEGAL+COMPLIANCE RISK: Payroll and EOR automation involves labor law compliance in each country — payroll errors have legal and financial consequences. Worker misclassification between employee and contractor is a regulatory liability. EOR onboarding automation must complete all jurisdiction-specific compliance steps before worker start date.

auth.notes: Papaya Global uses OAuth 2.0 for API access. Account-level credentials with payroll, worker, and reporting scopes. Partner API for HRIS integrations. Webhooks for payroll and worker events. SAP, Workday, and BambooHR integration partnerships. Sandbox environment for testing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-worker monthly pricing
pricing.notes: Tel Aviv, Israel. Founded 2016. Global workforce payment platform. $100M+ raised. Used by Microsoft, Toyota, and Intel. 160+ countries, 100+ currencies. Airwallex-powered payment infrastructure. EOR services with local legal entities. Competes with Deel and Remote for global EOR market.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth application; payroll processing async

known_agent_gotchas: LEGAL RISK: Payroll automation must complete country-specific compliance steps; incomplete compliance triggers legal liability
Worker classification — automated EOR vs contractor classification must match actual work arrangement; misclassification is liability
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API with partner portal access
Payroll processing is async — payroll run initiation returns job ID; agent must poll for completion
Country-specific payroll rules — automation must handle country-specific tax rates, social contributions, and cutoff dates
Limited public documentation — API access requires commercial relationship and partner onboarding
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global payroll and worker data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/IL. Employee PII, payroll, and tax data sensitivity.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global payroll and EOR data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU/IL. Employee and payroll data sensitivity.
